query: SELECT id, name, category, strain, photos, farmerId FROM products WHERE status != 'inactive' AND (category LIKE '%hemp%' OR category LIKE '%cbd%' OR name LIKE '%CBD%' OR name LIKE '%Hemp%' OR name LIKE '%CBG%' OR name LIKE '%CBN%') ORDER BY category, name LIMIT 100;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aN4XovBvgLTwiy.root --database jWmfVYBaikHBYpPLbpiijG --execute SELECT id, name, category, strain, photos, farmerId FROM products WHERE status != 'inactive' AND (category LIKE '%hemp%' OR category LIKE '%cbd%' OR name LIKE '%CBD%' OR name LIKE '%Hemp%' OR name LIKE '%CBG%' OR name LIKE '%CBN%') ORDER BY category, name LIMIT 100;
